page_content:
MUSC329 Ensemble (1 Credit)

Rehearsal and performance of selected works for small ensembles of instruments, piano, or small vocal groups. After two registrations in MUSC129, the student will elect MUSC229 for two additional semesters and MUSC329 thereafter.

MUSC330 Music History III (3 Credits)

A historical study of Western music from 1800 to present. Prerequisite: MUSC320; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department.
